title: Outbox: Auth retry orchestrator (NIP-42 CLOSED/OK auth-required flow)
description: Implement NIP-42 auth retry for both REQ (CLOSED auth-required) and EVENT (OK auth-required). On auth-required: sign kind:22242 with stored challenge + relay URL, send AUTH, wait for OK, re-send original REQ/EVENT. On restricted: skip relay. Store challenge string per relay. Handle NIP-70 protected events (['-'] tag) by requiring auth before send. Files: RelayPool.swift, Relay.swift. Depends on CLOSED parsing (damus-vxx).

title: Outbox: Write-side relay routing (PostBox inbox delivery)
description: When publishing events, in addition to sending to author's write relays, also send to read relays of tagged users (NIP-65 inbox). Update PostBox to resolve tagged pubkeys' read relays via OutboxRelayResolver and deliver there. Also publish author's kind:10002 event to all relays event was sent to. Reference: NIP-65 publishing rules.

title: Outbox: NIP-11 relay limits enforcement (max_subscriptions)
description: Fetch NIP-11 relay info documents for connected relays. Enforce max_subscriptions limit per relay. Implement pass-based accounting (inspired by notedeck SubPassGuardian). Queue subscriptions when limits hit, flush when passes freed. Analogous to notedeck relay/limits.rs SubPass system. Reference: NIP-11 limitation.max_subscriptions.

title: Outbox: OutboxRelayResolver - per-pubkey relay resolution from kind:10002
description: Build an actor-based component that maintains a cache of read/write relays per pubkey from kind:10002 events in NostrDB. Expose resolveReadRelays(for: [Pubkey]) and resolveWriteRelays(for: [Pubkey]). Uses NIP65.RelayList parsing already in codebase. Analogous to notedeck OutboxSubscriptions relay tracking but adapted for Swift async/await. Reference: NIP-65, notedeck relay/subscription.rs

title: Outbox: Tests - write-side routing + stress
description: Tests for write-side routing (event class split, DM kind:10050, protected events NIP-70, blocked relay filtering) and stress/soak tests (500+ follows, relay flap, hostile kind:10002, queue backpressure). Depends on: 1c6.

title: Outbox: Relay selection algorithm - minimize connections via greedy grouping
description: Implement relay selection that groups authors onto minimal relay set. Algorithm from hzrd149: calculate relay popularity from kind:10002 lists, limit each user to 2 relays (most popular of theirs), greedily select relay covering most uncovered users, repeat until all covered or max connections hit. Long tail pubkeys fall back to user's own relays. Analogous to notedeck CompactionRelay bin-packing but at the relay selection layer. Reference: nostrability#69 hzrd149 comment, coracle Router.ts approach.

title: Outbox: Autopilot toggle & settings UI
description: Add autopilot/outbox toggle to relay settings. When enabled (default), outbox routing is active. When disabled, fall back to user's configured relay list only. Wire to existing relay settings view. Reference: damus-io/damus#423 acceptance criteria, mockup in issue.

title: Outbox: Tests - auth retry + feed routing
description: Integration tests for auth retry orchestrator (CLOSED auth-required flow, retry exhaustion) and feed-level outbox routing (fiatjaf scenario, 3-relay distribution, fallback authors, since-optimization). Depends on: 0xx, u4e.

title: Outbox: Tests - relay resolver, selection algorithm, feed routing
description: Test suite covering: 1) OutboxRelayResolver correctly parses kind:10002 and returns read/write relays per pubkey. 2) Relay selection algorithm produces minimal relay sets. 3) Feed routing splits filters correctly. 4) Fallback to broadcast when outbox relays unreachable. 5) fiatjaf scenario: event only on hinted relay, outbox makes it reachable. Reference: notedeck outbox_integration.rs tests, existing damusTests/RelayHintsTests.swift.
close_reason: Split into 4 phase-aligned test beads: damus-usx (resolver+selector), damus-pkb (CLOSED+NIP-11), damus-gsm (auth+feed), damus-bks (write+stress)

title: Research: Notedeck outbox architecture & applicability to iOS Damus
description: Study notedeck PR #1288 outbox infrastructure approach and analyze how each component maps to iOS Damus. Reference: damus-io/damus#423, nostrability/nostrability#69. Key notedeck components: OutboxPool, RelayCoordinator, CompactionRelay, TransparentRelay, QueuedTasks, SubPass limits, OutboxSubscriptions. Key iOS Damus existing infra: RelayPool (with ephemeral relay management), SubscriptionManager (with relay hint consumption), NIP65 parsing, PostBox.
close_reason: Research complete. Comprehensive analysis of notedeck PR #1288, iOS damus architecture, NIPs 65/11/19, and community approaches from nostrability#69.

title: Outbox: Tests - CLOSED parsing + NIP-11 policy
description: Tests for CLOSED message parsing, MachineReadablePrefix extraction, RelayPolicyCache NIP-11 fetch/cache/fallback, subscription slot tracking (acquire/release/queue), NIP-11 URL conversion helper. Depends on: vxx, 6rb.

title: Outbox: Feed-level outbox routing in SubscriptionManager
description: Feed-level outbox routing in SubscriptionManager. Route timeline/feed subscriptions through OutboxRelayResolver and OutboxRelaySelector. Includes: per-relay filter splitting, ephemeral lease management, EOSE since-optimization, CLOSED auth-required retry, NIP-10 pubkey fallback. Depends on: ae0 (resolver), c7a (selector), 6rb (NIP-11 policy), vxx (CLOSED parsing), 0xx (auth retry).

title: Outbox: Tests - resolver + selector
description: Unit and integration tests for OutboxRelayResolver and OutboxRelaySelector. Covers: kind:10002/10050/10006 resolution, NIP-05 fallback, blocked relay filtering, greedy set-cover algorithm, edge cases (no 10002, all same relay, maxConnections=1). Depends on: ae0, c7a.

title: Outbox: CLOSED message parsing + MachineReadablePrefix (NIP-01/42)
description: Add CLOSED message parsing to NostrResponse.swift. Parse machine-readable prefixes (auth-required, restricted, duplicate, pow, blocked, rate-limited, invalid, error, mute) from both CLOSED and OK messages per NIP-01:174-178 and NIP-42:54-59. Add ClosedResult struct and MachineReadablePrefix enum. Handle CLOSED in RelayPool message dispatch. This unblocks auth retry and subscription lifecycle handling. Files: NostrResponse.swift, RelayPool.swift.
